title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the second Classic race—the
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Something about the Derby feels way
different from other races.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I can't tell if the air feels super thin and tense or
super heavy and foreboding...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, c'mon! It's not like I'm nervous or anything!
Well, maybe just a little!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I did tons of partner running to prepare and
everything. There's no way I'm gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna surpass Prez, I can't let my momentum
die here!
choice_data_list: Show them how hard you've trained!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, for sure! I can already taste my victory!
